topic: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among)

sections.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Preposition + noun/pronoun to show place or time relationship. Rules: 'In' for enclosed spaces/months/years, 'On' for surfaces/days/dates, 'At' for points/exact times | 'Under' = below, 'Over' = above, 'Between' = two things, 'Among' = more than two things | Prepositions never change form regardless of subject | Common mistake: mixing up in/on/at for time expressions
sections.formula: Preposition + noun/pronoun to show place or time relationship

examples.english: The book is on the table.
The cat is under the table.
We are in the room.
I will come at 5 pm.
My birthday is in January.
The meeting is on Monday.

sections.title: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Prepositions Part 1 — Place & Time (In, On, At, Under, Over, Between, Among) for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Preposition + noun/pronoun to show place or time relationship

examples.english: The lamp is over the table.

examples.hindi: यह किताब मेरी और तुम्हारी के बीच है।
examples.english: This book is between mine and yours.

examples.hindi: यह प्रतियोगिता तीन टीमों के बीच है।
examples.english: This competition is among three teams.
We live in Delhi.
He is standing at the door.
The book is on the shelf.

examples.hindi: बच्चे बगीचे में खेल रहे हैं।
examples.english: The children are playing in the garden.
My meeting is at 10 am.

examples.hindi: हम गर्मियों में यात्रा करते हैं।
examples.english: We travel in summer.
His wedding is on Friday.

sections.formula: Preposition + noun/pronoun to show place or time relationship

examples.english: The bridge is over the river.

examples.hindi: वह दो दोस्तों के बीच बैठा है।
examples.english: He is sitting between two friends.

examples.hindi: यह किताब सभी छात्रों के बीच बहुत पसंद है।
examples.english: This book is very popular among all students.

examples.hindi: मैं ऑफिस में काम करता हूँ।
examples.english: I work in the office.
